CashRegister_Desc: A cash register for managing your own shop! Place it down in a farm building to use it.
RoboShopkeep_Desc: This automated retail bot will sell your things to customers all around the world each night! Place it down in a farm building to use it.
Haggle_Compromise_Krobus: C'mon now, we both know what {0} is worth.$8
Haggle_Overpriced_Krobus: I could buy Zuzu City with that money.$8
Haggle_Compromise_Bookseller: {1}$ is a lot even for a bestseller...$s
Haggle_Overpriced_Bookseller: {1}$!?! Retail markups are insane these days!$s
Haggle_Success_Bookseller: I can't wait to read this, here's {1}$!$h
Haggle_Fail_Bookseller: I'll just order it by mail...$s
Tourism_BooksellerDay_Desc: If you have books on sale, booklovers will visit your shop!
WillyWalrus.Willy.01: Ah... come in, ${lad^miss}$. Close the door behind ye...
WillyWalrus.Willy.03: Come closer... me got somethin' to show ye.
WillyWalrus.Willy.05: I had it lyin' around... thought you might make use of it.$1
WillyWalrus.Willy.06: You ever consider runnin' a little shop of yer own?
WillyWalrus.Player.A1: Lewis already sells my products for me.
WillyWalrus.Willy.R1: Aye... makes things easy, I reckon. Still...
WillyWalrus.Willy.08: Feels like this town relies on the same few shops for near everything.#$b#Not many folk tryin' their hand at tradin' these days...$2
WillyWalrus.Willy.09: Seems to me... if a body's willin' to work... they ought to have the chance.#$b#Heh, a bit o'... what's that fancy term me ol' Pappy used to use...
WillyWalrus.Willy.11: You've been out there... fields... mines... rivers... gettin' yer hands on all sorts o' things, I'd wager.#$b#Reckon you could set up a little counter... lay out yer goods... let folks see what you've got.
WillyWalrus.Willy.12: Might bring a bit more life back to the valley.
WillyWalrus.Willy.13: Just a thought, mind. No pressure.#$b#But... if you ever do set up shop... I might know a fisherman with a steady supply o' fresh stock.
